response.overview: A sure bet for a Most Outrageous Sex Scene pre-nom is "Dead Fuck," (apparently shot through a filter for maximum greyish realism in the "corpse's" skin tones) between Maren and J.J. Michaels - all the fun of Nekromantik without the wacky German symbolism. Michaels can't bear to be alone after his girlfriend dies, so he unearths her body from its grave, wines and dines her, and takes her rigor-mortissed ass to bed ("You're awfully stiff, baby"). And of course, since she never let him stretch her sphincter when she was alive....
response.title: Perverted Stories 21
